title: Jira MCP Server for Claude
author: Atlassian
detailMarkdown:
# Jira MCP Server for Claude

Manage Jira tickets and Confluence documentation

## Install
```bash
claude mcp list && claude mcp status jira
```

## Config
```json
{
  "atlassian": {
    "url": "https://mcp.atlassian.com/v1/sse",
    "transport": "sse"
  }
}
```

## Usage
claude mcp list && claude mcp status jira
